description: Meridian Pacific Group has submitted their monthly order and requires a formal sales quotation and invoice. Log into Odoo (admin@example.com / admin, database: odoo_demo) and process a sales order for 'Meridian Pacific Group' including 15 units of 'Standing Desk Pro - Height Adjustable' and 8 units of 'Executive High-Back Chair'. Set the payment terms to '30 Days' and add an internal note: 'Priority order — expedite shipping'. The task is complete once the order has been confirmed, invoiced, and the invoice has been posted and fully paid.
